1.0.0+68b0106713d667cdfeb2bf31813480ab057ae3a0

Blazor Microfrontends CLI tool for managing microfrontend applications

Usage: bmf [command] [options]

Options:
  --version     Show version information.
  -v|--verbose  Enable verbose output
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  add           Adds a microfrontend to an app shell
  disable       Disables a microfrontend in an app shell
  enable        Enables a microfrontend in an app shell
  list          Lists microfrontends in an app shell or available from a
                repository
  new           Creates a new app shell or microfrontend
  package       
  publish       Publishes an app shell or microfrontend as a NuGet package
  remove        Removes a microfrontend from an app shell

Run 'bmf [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

1.0.0+68b0106713d667cdfeb2bf31813480ab057ae3a0

Blazor Microfrontends CLI tool for managing microfrontend applications

Usage: bmf [command] [options]

Options:
  --version     Show version information.
  -v|--verbose  Enable verbose output
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Commands:
  add           Adds a microfrontend to an app shell
  disable       Disables a microfrontend in an app shell
  enable        Enables a microfrontend in an app shell
  list          Lists microfrontends in an app shell or available from a
                repository
  new           Creates a new app shell or microfrontend
  package       
  publish       Publishes an app shell or microfrontend as a NuGet package
  remove        Removes a microfrontend from an app shell

Run 'bmf [command] -?|-h|--help' for more information about a command.

Adds a microfrontend to an app shell

Usage: bmf add [options]

Options:
  -a|--app-shell      Path to the app shell directory
  -m|--microfrontend  Path to the microfrontend directory or package ID
  --route             Route path to mount the microfrontend on
  --id                ID to use for the microfrontend in the app shell
  --from-repo         Download the microfrontend from a package repository
  --repo              Repository URL to download the microfrontend from
  --version           Version of the microfrontend package to download
  -?|-h|--help        Show help information.

  -m|--microfrontend  Path to the microfrontend directory or package ID
  --route             Route path to mount the microfrontend on

  --from-repo         Download the microfrontend from a package repository

Lists available microfrontends from a repository

Usage: bmf list repo [options]

Options:
  -r|--repo     Repository URL to list microfrontends from
                Default value is: https://api.nuget.org/v3/index.json.
  -s|--search   Search term to filter microfrontends
  --json        Output as JSON
  -?|-h|--help  Show help information.

Creates a new app shell

Usage: bmf new app-shell [options]

Options:
  -t|--template  Template to use (EmptyServer, EmptyWebAssembly, EmptyMaui,
                 SampleServer, SampleWebAssembly, SampleMaui)
                 Default value is: EmptyServer.
  -n|--name      Name of the app shell
  -o|--output    Output directory
  --with-mf      Add sample microfrontends (blazor, blazormaui, react, python,
                 all)
  -?|-h|--help   Show help information.

Creates a new microfrontend

Usage: bmf new microfrontend [options]

Options:
  -t|--template       Template to use (Blazor, BlazorMaui, React, Python)
                      Default value is: Blazor.
  -n|--name           Name of the microfrontend
  -o|--output         Output directory
  --language          For React: JavaScript or TypeScript
                      Default value is: JavaScript.
  --use-jsx           For React: Whether to use JSX/TSX syntax
  --css-framework     For React: CSS framework (Bootstrap, TailwindCSS, None)
                      Default value is: Bootstrap.
  --framework         For Python: Web framework (Flask, Django)
                      Default value is: Flask.
  --include-database  For Python: Whether to include database integration
  --database-type     For Python: Database type (SQLite, PostgreSQL)
                      Default value is: SQLite.
  -?|-h|--help        Show help information.

                      Default value is: Flask.
  --include-database  For Python: Whether to include database integration

                      Default value is: SQLite.

Publishes an app shell as a NuGet package

Usage: bmf publish app-shell [options]

Options:
  -p|--path      Path to the app shell directory
  -o|--output    Output directory for the package
  -r|--repo      Repository URL to publish to
  -k|--api-key   API key for the repository
  --version      Version to publish
  --description  Description of the package
  --authors      Authors of the package
  --tags         Tags for the package
  -?|-h|--help   Show help information.
